concepts.name: Unwrap on Option
concepts.problem: Using unwrap() on Option<T> can cause panic at runtime
concepts.fix: Use unwrap_or, unwrap_or_else, or pattern matching instead

concepts.name: Expect on Option
concepts.problem: Using expect() on Option<T> can cause panic with an unwitnessed message
concepts.fix: Use unwrap_or_else with a meaningful fallback or proper error handling

concepts.name: Unwrap on Result
concepts.problem: Using unwrap() on Result<T, E> loses error information
concepts.fix: Use unwrap_err(), unwrap_unchecked(), or proper error handling with ? operator

concepts.name: Expect on Result Without Context
concepts.problem: expect() message should describe the error context
concepts.fix: Provide meaningful context in expect() message

concepts.name: Error Chain Breaking
concepts.problem: When catching an error and returning it, error chain information is lost
concepts.fix: Use ? operator to preserve the error chain

concepts.name: Custom Error Missing std::error::Error
concepts.problem: Custom error types should implement std::error::Error trait
concepts.fix: Implement std::error::Error for custom error types

concepts.name: Option Used Where Result Expected
concepts.problem: When a function can fail, Result<T, E> should be used instead of Option<T>
concepts.fix: Change return type from Option to Result to provide error context

concepts.name: Panic for Validation
concepts.problem: Using panic! or unwrap() for input validation can cause unexpected crashes
concepts.fix: Use Result or explicit validation with clear error messages

concepts.name: Meaningless Default Value
concepts.problem: Using unwrap_or_default() can hide errors by providing meaningless defaults
concepts.fix: Use unwrap_or with a meaningful default value

concepts.name: Incomplete Match on Result/Option
concepts.problem: Incomplete matches on Result or Option can panic
concepts.fix: Handle all variants or use _ wildcard

concepts.name: Error Logged After Conversion
concepts.problem: When converting errors, the original error information is lost if not logged first
concepts.fix: Log the original error before converting

concepts.name: to_string for Error Conversion
concepts.problem: Using to_string() on errors loses type information
concepts.fix: Use from() or into() for proper error conversion
